raw_evidence: Horse not present in ATR Epsom 5 Jun 2026 full-day racecard HTML (https://www.attheraces.com/racecards/epsom-downs/2026-06-05, 2.5MB page, 152 distinct horse entries extracted, zero matched 'Cato'). ATR horse search API (https://www.attheraces.com/atr-http-api/form/horse/search?name=cato&country=ire) blocked by Fastly Client Challenge JavaScript bot protection — returns 3035-byte challenge page, not JSON data. No ATR horse ID found for Cato (IRE), so a direct form/horse profile URL could not be constructed. Google site-search for attheraces.com form/horse Cato returned no matching profile. Cannot provide going history without ATR access.
